channel.title: releases on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in releases on Drupal WxT

item.title: Releases
item.description: Important We try our best to have security releases of Drupal Core within 24-72 hours of being made available on drupal.org. The following table is a list of all the releases that are housed under the DrupalWxT organization on GitHub. Release Created Date Description 3.0.24 2021-05-27T12:47:17Z 4.0.5 2021-05-27T01:57:24Z Updates for Drupal Core SA-core-2021-003 Updates for WxT WxT Install UX Improvement #3211057 Misplaced Pathauto config prevents site installations #3211052 wxt_core update 8403 fails on blocks with null id #3213304 CKEditor improvements add Details functionality #3213286 CKEditor improvements add Panels functionality #3213766 Page manager patch not D9 compatible #3214053 Translate the “Did you find” webform #3203752 Updates for WxT Bootstrap (8.
